rqs: What are the time and space complexities of QuickSort, MergeSort, HeapSort, Radix Sort, and TimSort versus Insertion, Bubble, Selection, Shell, and Naive Sort in academic journals and conference proceedings?
Which advanced sorting algorithms (QuickSort, MergeSort, HeapSort, Radix Sort, TimSort) show better stability and scalability than classic sorts in open‑source repositories and benchmark suites?

In which contexts (high‑performance computing, embedded systems, data processing) do advanced sorting algorithms outperform classic ones in throughput according to industry reports and benchmark suites?

questions.text: Is the algorithm implementation described in sufficient detail to reproduce?
Are experimental settings (hardware, datasets) fully reported?
Is the evaluation methodology (metrics, baselines) appropriate for the research question?
Are the results validated against established benchmarks or prior work?
Does the study discuss relevance to the target contexts (e.g., HPC, embedded)?
